productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Love & Luck  Men Fragrance Gift Set
description: ed hardy brings forth a vintage tattoo-inspired fragrance sensation gift set for men. The ed hardy Love & Luck Love Is A Gamble gift set comes in a psychedellic explosion of colours on the box and provocatively edgy fragrance that makes this a perfect gift for that special man in your life. The cylindrical cologne bottle features graphics of cards, dice and coins, reinforcing the theme of the collection.This set contains notes of bergamot, orange, mandarin, cardamom, absinthe, sage, cypress, violet, cedar wood, dark vetiver and agarwood.Shampoo and body wash lotion of 90 mlAlcohol-free deodrant of 78 mgEu De Toilette Spray of 100 ml Eu De Toilette Mini of 7.5 ml
